1.anchor: This letter is from John, the elder.

7.anchor: For they are traveling for the Lord,
7.note: Greek They went out on behalf of the Name.

7.anchor: and they accept nothing from people who are not believers.

11.anchor: Dear friend, don’t let this bad example influence you. Follow only what is good. Remember that those who do good prove that they are God’s children, and those who do evil prove that they do not know God.
11.note: Greek they have not seen God.
